ddls:
CREATE TABLE "utility_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the utility provider (e.g., PG&E) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the utility provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the utility provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address of the utility provider */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Geographic service areas covered by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility provider */,
  "tariff_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff (e.g., G1 T Residential Service) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff */,
  "base_rate" REAL /* Base rate of the tariff */,
  "tiered_rates" TEXT /* Tiered rates in JSON format */,
  "additional_charges" REAL /* Any additional charges */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariffs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES utility_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility provider */,
  "contact_preference" TEXT /* Preferred contact method (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES utility_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tariff */,
  "bill_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the billing cycle */,
  "bill_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the billing cycle */,
  "bill_days" INTEGER /* Number of days in the billing cycle */,
  "bill_statement_date" TEXT /* Date the bill statement was generated */,
  "bill_total_kWh" REAL /* Total energy consumption in kWh */,
  "bill_total" REAL /* Total bill amount */,
  "updated" TEXT /* Date the bill was last updated */,
  "bill_status" TEXT /* Status of the bill (e.g., paid, unpaid, overdue) */,
  "previous_bill_amount" REAL /* Amount of the previous bill for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_tariff_id FOREIGN KEY ("tariff_id") REFERENCES tariffs ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction identifier from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumption_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical consumption record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the consumption */,
  "consumption_kWh" REAL /* Energy consumption in kWh */,
  "utility_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_history_utility_type FOREIGN KEY ("utility_type") REFERENCES utility_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumption_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget target */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date the target is set for */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Target energy consumption amount */,
  "target_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the target period */,
  "target_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the target period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_targets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bill due, unusual usage) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utility_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the utility type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the utility type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Standard unit of measurement for the utility type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_volume" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill volume */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the bill */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the volume (e.g., therms) */,
  "volume_type" TEXT /* Type of volume (e.g., consumption, generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_volume_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_total_unit" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill total unit */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bill */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the bill total (e.g., therms) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor used to convert the unit to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_total_unit_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
